allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@tabler/icons-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.startsWith\('Icon'\)\); const check = ['IconHandshake','IconShieldCheck','IconBadge','IconGauge','IconHeadset','IconBrandWhatsapp','IconBadgeCheck']; check.forEach\(n => console.log\(n, ':', names.includes\(n\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@tabler/icons-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.startsWith\('Icon'\)\); const hand = names.filter\(n => n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('hand'\)\); console.log\('hand:', hand\)")
